tasks.label: backend: sync static
tasks.command:
@'
$target = Join-Path (Resolve-Path .\backend).Path 'app\static'
if (Test-Path $target) { Get-ChildItem -Path $target -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne '.gitkeep' } | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force }
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $target | Out-Null
Copy-Item -Path .\dist\* -Destination $target -Recurse -Force
'@ | powershell -NoProfile -Command -
